payload.issue: Audit export configuration missing retention and export sink
payload.evidence_span: prod.yaml: audit.enabled=true with retention_days/export_sink empty. dev.yaml: dev.api_token and dev.debug are present under a dev-only profile.
payload.recommended_fix: Set retention_days and export_sink in prod.yaml audit configuration to ensure audit logs are retained and exported.

payload.issue: Development-only credentials and debug mode present in configuration
payload.evidence_span: prod.yaml: audit.enabled=true with retention_days/export_sink empty. dev.yaml: dev.api_token and dev.debug are present under a dev-only profile.
payload.recommended_fix: Remove dev-only profile configurations from production deployment; ensure dev.yaml is not deployed to production environment.
